name: Cocoa-Nut Meringue Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Flake and toast the coconut.
2. Combine the coconut, pecans, and margarine. Press onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. In a bowl, combine the cream cheese, sugar, cocoa, water, and vanilla. Mix at medium speed on an electric mixer until well blended. Blend in the egg yolks and pour over the crust.
4. Bake at 350 degrees F for 30 minutes. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan and cool before removing the rim of the pan.
5. Beat the egg whites and salt until foamy. Gradually add the marshmallow creme, beating until stiff peaks form. Sprinkle pecans over the cheesecake to within 1/2-inch of the outer edge.
6. Carefully spread the marshmallow creme mixture over the top of the cheesecake to seal it.
7. Bake at 350 degrees F for 15 minutes. Cool.
